location.name: Art appraisers in Dallas, Texas

listedAppraisers.name: Alicia E Weaver (ISA CAPP)
listedAppraisers.description: Alicia E Weaver (ISA CAPP) provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Americana, Decorative arts, Paintings. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.
